name: hud_ui_save_load_process_dialog_result
description: HudUiSaveLoadDialog::ProcessDialogResult validates the selected save name, loads its ZAR, restores paused audio/input option state, and queues the app-state transition for standard and fade load modes.
known_limits: Binary Ninja assembly for 0x435a70 validates the game-name buffer guard, SavedGames path construction, FileExists and ZAR_LoadFileGlobal gates, paused-audio snapshot cleanup for both transition owners, joystick/cursor/camera/throttle/steering option refreshes, and transition-mode dispatch.

The standard transition branch duplicates the save path into RecoilApp_PlayState::pPendingLoadGameStartPath, marks the mission FMV state to skip FMV, queues ExitCurrent with parameter 1, and queues SwitchCurrent to the mission FMV state with parameter 0.

The fade and quickload branches extend or start the transition fade timer by 5 seconds, mute sound when starting the timer, and queue ExitCurrent with parameters 1 for fade or 0 for quickload. The smoke covers the standard branch and the fade branch with a newly started timer.

Current VC5SP3 binary-safe attempt uses tools/vc6_verify_targets/hud_ui_save_load_process_dialog_result.json with cl 11.00.7022 and /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs. It still fails byte comparison: BN size 520, VC size 528, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, 228 relocation bytes masked, and 228 unmasked mismatches. Remaining drift is branch displacement/import-call relocation shape and schedule around the verified transition dispatch; keep Binary-safe marked ❌.
